plan_name: Kilkenny City and County Development Plan 2021-2027 (Volume 1, County)
source_url: https://consult.kilkenny.ie/ (Kilkenny City & County Development Plan 2021-2027, Volume 1)
portal: consult.kilkenny.ie (shared LA consultation portal) + kilkennycoco.ie PDF
fetch_method: PDF (pdftotext) of Volume 1; HTML chapter also archived
notes: Chapter 13 is the DM-standards chapter. Car-parking standards are in Chapter 12 (not transcribed - in raw); rural one-off-house siting in Chapter 7 (County Kilkenny Rural Design Guide). Plot ratio max 2.0 urban / 1.0 elsewhere; site coverage 65% (85% urban).
